Headline: #8 Halsted Temporary Reroute at Canalport/Halsted
ShortDescription: 8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near Canalport/Halsted.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Halsted, Cermak, Ashland, 18th St., Halsted and over regular route due to police activity near Canalport/Halsted.

Allow extra travel time.
